/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -Wno-deprecated-declarations -rdynamic CMakeFiles/livox_test.dir/tool/livox_test.cpp.o -o livox_test   -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/aarch64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu:/usr/local/cuda/targets/aarch64-linux/lib /livox_ws/Livox-SDK/build/sdk_core/liblivox_sdk_static.a -ldl -lm -lpthread
